In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: c:\Users\mohsho\.vscode\extensions\mohamed-sayed.bmad-studio-1.0.0\resources\_bmad
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL c:\Users\mohsho\.vscode\extensions\mohamed-sayed.bmad-studio-1.0.0\resources\_bmad/bmm/workflows/4-implementation/retrospective/workflow.yaml, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!
